title: agrostis glabra
intro: Agrostis glabra, also known as smooth bent grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Northern Hemisphere, particularly found in moist meadows and grasslands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis glabra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Agrostis glabra can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a variety of uses in natural remedies and traditional healing practices.
